creator: liangtai.s16@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 170892
multimedia/qmmp: Switch version from 0.9.9 to 0.9.10

qmmp-0.9.10 has been released.  This minor upgraded version contains
* SID plugin improvement, and
* Updated translation.

Beside of this update, in Makefile:
* Declare more dependency information that the Q/A test claims, and
* Set PORTSCOUT to specify targeted version is 0.*, not 1.*.
